title: Eternity SMP
description: Eternity SMP is a heavy lore server surrounding an eternal war between the forces of Creation, and Destruction. We are silly. Led by Necrophobix, Panda__Alex, and Ghostpool!
body:
Welcome to the Eternity SMP official modpack!

Eternity SMP is a private modded minecraft lore server that takes place during a war between Creation and Destruction. It is led by KitStarz_, and the Eternity SMP staff team.

From new biomes from Cinderscapes, to magic from Bewithcment, this modpack includes mods such as Cosmetica, Btterend, Supplementaries, and Origins, with many more for both building, gameplay, and overall fun purposes. It is used by the official Eternity SMP server, but is for all who wish to enjoy the experience.

Come join the Eternity SMP public discord to see what the crew is up to! https://discord.gg/Y9mqU9bmuC
